title: Smoked Italian Gnocchi
description: A simple yet flavorful dish that combines the richness of smoked potato gnocchi with the bold flavors of Italian seasoning.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook the gnocchi according to package instructions until they float to the surface.
Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining the gnocchi.
In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of hot sauce over medium heat.
Add 2 cups of smoked potato gnocchi to the skillet and toss with the hot sauce.
Sprinkle with 1/4 cup of Italian seasoning and toss to combine.
Add the reserved pasta water to the skillet and stir to combine.
Serve the smoked gnocchi immediately, garnished with additional Italian seasoning if desired.
